dailyNews.title: US forces obliterated Iran, air force and navy gone: Donald Trump
dailyNews.description: US forces obliterated Iran air force and navy gone Donald Trump

dailyNews.title: Who is Seth Chambers, ex-Marine Intel analyst indicted for leaking classified US defense information to China?
dailyNews.description: A former Marine Intelligence analyst from Texas County, Missouri, was indicted for transmitting national defense information. He allegedly shared classified documents with individuals in Maryland and China. The charges are allegations pending evidence presentation in a federal trial.

dailyNews.title: US, Israel now know ‘what kind of nation they are dealing with’
dailyNews.description: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says his country has shown it is ready to take the war “as far as necessary".

dailyNews.title: 'America Has No Loyalty': Iran's Ali Larijani Issues Message To Muslim World As War Rages
dailyNews.description: Larjani said that his country cannot be 'expected to stand idly with its hands tied' while the US bases located in the neighbouring countries are carrying out attacks on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Shopify is preparing for AI shopping agents to change everything, exec says
dailyNews.description: Shopify is preparing for an ecommerce transformation via AI shopping agents, says president Harley Finklestein.

dailyNews.title: Is Russia benefitting from the Iran war?
dailyNews.description: The US is allowing the purchase of Russian oil that’s stranded at sea after the war on Iran led to higher energy prices.

dailyNews.title: China Sees US-Iran War As Both Warning And Opportunity: Fareed Zakaria
dailyNews.description: The images from the war in the Middle East are being watched carefully in Beijing not with alarm, but with calculation.

dailyNews.title: Wary allies show there's no quick fix to Trump's Iran crisis
dailyNews.description: European leaders are hesitant to help Trump secure the Strait of Hormuz, but they know inaction on the Iran war isn't really an option.

dailyNews.title: Hormuz Disruption: India Says Not Engaged In Bilateral Talks With US Amid Trump's Appeal
dailyNews.description: MEA spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal's remarks came in response to a question on whether the US had approached India to send its warships to the region.

dailyNews.title: MEA clarifies India hasn't engaged in bilateral talks with US amid Trump's call to deploy warships to Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: India clarified that it has not engaged in bilateral talks with the US about ensuring safe passage for merchant ships through the Strait of Hormuz. The statement follows US President Trump's calls for nations to deploy warships to keep the crucial maritime corridor open.

dailyNews.title: Iran officials tout ‘Trump-burning’ celebration amid battle of narratives
dailyNews.description: Iranian state media calls for turning fire festival into a symbolic protest by burning figures of Trump and Netanyahu.

dailyNews.title: EU leaders reject military involvement in Strait of Hormuz amid war on Iran
dailyNews.description: Pushback comes as US President Donald Trump says NATO allies should help secure key waterway amid soaring oil prices.

dailyNews.title: One of USA's largest meatpacking plants goes on strike: 3,800 workers walk out, allege unfair labour practices — Details
dailyNews.description: Around 3,800 workers at Swift Beef Co. in Colorado initiated a strike, marking the first walkout at a U.S. beef slaughterhouse since the 1980s. Union officials allege unfair labor practices by JBS USA amid contract negotiations as beef prices rise amidst a low U.S. cattle population.

dailyNews.title: US says it has destroyed Iran missile capacity: How is Iran still shooting?
dailyNews.description: Despite degraded launch capabilities, Iran has enough missiles to fire strategically, keep region on edge, say experts.

dailyNews.title: Suspension of 8 Opposition MPs to be revoked? Matter to come up in Lok Sabha on March 17
dailyNews.description: The seven Congress MPs and a CPI(M) member were suspended for the entire Budget session over ‘unruly behaviour.’

dailyNews.title: The US-Israeli strategy against Iran is working. Here is why
dailyNews.description: Every aspect of Iran’s ability to project regional power is being successfully degraded.

dailyNews.title: No talks with US on warship deployment in Hormuz: India on Trump's global appeal
dailyNews.description: No talks with US on warship deployment in Hormuz India on Trumps global appeal

dailyNews.title: US severe weather alert: Schools close in Virginia, Charlotte; DC alters schedules
dailyNews.description: Severe weather warnings prompted school closures in parts of Virginia and schedule changes in the Charlotte region, while several D.C.-area schools shifted to early dismissal or remote learning.

dailyNews.title: South Korean protesters criticise Trump over Hormuz security demand
dailyNews.description: Activists in South Korea have staged a protest against Donald Trump’s request for help securing the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Fox supports the American Red Cross Service to the Armed Forces
dailyNews.description: FOX News Media is urging viewers to join FOX Corporation in supporting the American Red Cross’ Service to the Armed Forces.

dailyNews.title: Team USA's Mark DeRosa responds to criticism about inviting Navy SEAL who killed bin Laden to speak to players
dailyNews.description: Team USA World Baseball Classic manager Mark DeRosa explained why he had the U.S. Navy Seal credited with killing Osama bin Laden speak to the team.

dailyNews.title: WH chief of staff Susie Wiles diagnosed with early stage breast cancer, prognosis 'excellent,' Trump says
Man once eyed in disappearance of missing California teen now charged with murder
dailyNews.description: Joshua Martinez, an early suspect, arrested in 2019 disappearance of 17-year-old Victoria Marquina from Sutter Creek, California, considered a cold case.

dailyNews.title: Trump scolds reporter as 'very obnoxious' over question on Air Force One, blasts 'most corrupt' ABC News
dailyNews.description: Trump scolded "a very obnoxious" reporter who attempted to ask about sending troops to the Middle East as part of the war with Iran and blasted ABC News as "corrupt" on Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin official says there’s a 'very good chance' gas prices will be back to normal by summer
dailyNews.description: Department of Energy Secretary Chris Wright said Iran conflict will cause short-term gas price increases, but predicts normal prices by summer as Operation Epic Fury continues.

dailyNews.title: Rand Paul floats possible 2028 run, pushes back on Trump-era protectionism
dailyNews.description: Sen. Rand Paul considers 2028 presidential run, saying he'll decide after 2026 midterms while advocating for free market policies in Trump-dominated Republican Party.

dailyNews.title: Trump wants Judge Boasberg removed from cases after series of rulings
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump blasted Judge James Boasberg and asserted that he should be yanked off of cases related to his administration.

dailyNews.title: Blue state proposal targets Trump-era ICE hires, banning them from joining local police forces
dailyNews.description: Rhode Island Democrats propose banning police from hiring Trump-era ICE agents, escalating state pushback against federal immigration enforcement.

dailyNews.title: US 'locked and loaded' to destroy Iran’s 'crown jewel' 'if we want,' Trump warns
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump says the United States is prepared to destroy Iran’s Kharg Island oil export hub but so far has chosen not to do so.

dailyNews.title: In Iraq, the U.S. Tried to Bring Allies on Board. Not in Iran.
dailyNews.description: This time, President Trump went to war without preparing the public, seeking U.N. approval or even consulting allies. But they will have to pick up the pieces.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Threat to Delay Summit With Xi Casts New Shadow Over China Relations
dailyNews.description: President Trump warned that he could postpone a meeting set to begin in just over two weeks if China refuses to help reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: With Iran War, Trump Risks Stepping on Gains From His Own Tax Cuts
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s war in Iran has raised some costs just as many Americans are starting to see savings from last year’s tax cuts.

dailyNews.title: Professors Are Changing What They Teach, Even Far from Trump’s Gaze
dailyNews.description: Harvard is the White House’s biggest target, but professors all over the country have been censoring themselves, avoiding provocative topics and rewriting grants.

dailyNews.title: U.S. is allowing Iranian oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz, says Bessent
dailyNews.description: The White House believes tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz will increase before Navy escorts are deployed, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices fall as Trump pressures allies to help protect tankers in Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: The U.S. strikes on Kharg Island and Trump's threat to hit Iran's oil infrastructure mark a major escalation in the war, according to JPMorgan.

dailyNews.title: White House chief of staff Susie Wiles diagnosed with 'early stage breast cancer': Trump
dailyNews.description: Wiles "will be spending virtually full time at the White House" while being treated for breast cancer, President Donald Trump said Monday.

dailyNews.title: Trump-Xi China summit may be delayed if Trump wants to stay in Washington for Iran war: Bessent
dailyNews.description: Trump's visit, scheduled for March 31-April 2, would be the first for a U.S. president since he went to the country in 2017.
